Business: Tirupati Forge Limited produces and sells carbon steel forged flanges, forged, and other automotive components in India. The company provides slip-on, weld-neck, blind, lap-joint, threaded, din, and socket weld flanges; and elbow, tee, cross, coupling, half coupling, cap, plug, bushing, union, hex, nipple, and swag nipple forged pipe fittings.   Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)

  Current: 15.81  (-2.11% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows
